title: Blue Harvest (disambiguation)
content:
'''Blue Harvest''' can refer to a number of things:
*'''[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]''', which was known by the working title "Blue Harvest: Horror Beyond Imagination" during production
*'''[[Blue Harvest]]''', an episode of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]
*'''''[[Star Wars: Dark Times: Blue Harvest]]''''', a story arc of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]''
*[[Blue Harvest (novel)|'''''Blue Harvest''''']], a in-universe novel

{{Disambig}}
